programme.title: 9News Morning
programme.desc: Join 9News for up to the minute news on local and international news including sport and weather.

programme.title: The Hundred With Andy Lee
programme.desc: Host Andy Lee is joined by a panel of Australia's funniest comedians and a 100 regular Aussies via Zoom to explore the fun behind the facts that make us tick as a nation.

programme.title: Taronga: Who's Who In The Zoo
programme.desc: In one of the biggest vet procedures ever performed at Taronga Zoo nearly 30 staff and specialists are involved in the risky sedation of their 5 1/2 metre tall giraffe Jimiyu.

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Hosted by Alexander Armstrong. In each episode four teams of two contestants attempt to find correct but obscure answers to four rounds of general knowledge questions, with the winning team eligible to compete for the show's cash jackpot.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Hosted by Ben Shepherd, three players are pit against a mesmerising machine. There are mystery prizes and a jaw-dropping jackpot up for grabs for any player with the skill and strategy to see off their human rivals and conquer the machine.

programme.title: 9News Afternoon
programme.desc: Hosted by Monika Kos, this live one-hour state-wide bulletin brings viewers up-to-date with the news and debates of the day with a mix of live reports and expert chats. Your Perth, Your News.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Tipping Point Australia will push contestants' luck to the very edge. Three contestants will go head to head against the mesmerising machine with one lucky contestant playing for the Jackpot. Hosted by Todd Woodbridge.

programme.title: NBN News
programme.desc: NBN presents the latest in news, sport and weather locally, nationally and around the world.

programme.title: A Current Affair
programme.desc: A Current Affair covers the realms of politics, crime, human rights, science, technology, celebrities and entertainment - all investigated by a dedicated team.

programme.title: Events That Changed Australia
programme.desc: Our national game used to be available to only half of the population - until women became an unstoppable force on the Australian sporting field.

programme.title: Outback Murder Highway
programme.desc: Flinders Highway is dubbed Australia's most dangerous road, haunted by unsolved crimes. Experts reinvestigate how one young man could vanish without a trace. Every clue, every dead end and lead in Tony Jones' case is back in play.

programme.title: The Killer Interview with Piers Morgan
programme.desc: Piers Morgan speaks with some of the most notorious killers in the US. Kimberly Saenz, a nurse convicted of murdering her dialysis patients by injecting them with bleach, gives her first ever interview.

programme.title: 9News Late
programme.desc: Join the 9News Late team for all of today's top stories from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: Freddy And The Eighth
programme.desc: Join NRL Legend Brad Fittler, Danika Mason and NRL Immortal Andrew Johns for a unique look at all the biggest talking points of the week throughout the 2026 season.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Hosted by Ben Shepherd, three players are pit against a mesmerising machine. There are mystery prizes and a jaw-dropping jackpot up for grabs for any player with the skill and strategy to see off their human rivals and conquer the machine.

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Hosted by Alexander Armstrong. In each episode four teams of two contestants attempt to find correct but obscure answers to four rounds of general knowledge questions, with the winning team eligible to compete for the show's cash jackpot.

programme.title: Skippy - The Bush Kangaroo
programme.desc: Sonny and his kangaroo Skippy live in Waratah National Park in New South Wales. Matt Hammond, Sonny's father is the park ranger. Skippy saves the day in many adventures.

programme.title: A Current Affair
programme.desc: A Current Affair covers the realms of politics, crime, human rights, science, technology, celebrities and entertainment - all investigated by a dedicated team.

programme.title: Today Early News
programme.desc: Today Early News with up to date news from Australia and around the world as well as the latest in sport and weather.

programme.title: Today
programme.desc: Join Karl Stefanovic and Sarah Abo and the TODAY team as they bring you the latest in news, current affairs, sports, politics, entertainment, fashion, health and lifestyle.

programme.title: Today
programme.desc: Join Karl Stefanovic and Sarah Abo and the TODAY team as they bring you the latest in news, current affairs, sports, politics, entertainment, fashion, health and lifestyle.

programme.title: Today Extra
programme.desc: Join the TODAY EXTRA team for an exciting mix of topical issues, the best celebrity interviews, cooking with Australia's top chefs, LIVE music performances, the latest in fashion and beauty trends.

programme.title: 9News Morning
programme.desc: Join 9News for up to the minute news on local and international news including sport and weather.

programme.title: Our Take On Love
programme.desc: When unlucky-in-love Isabella and filmmaker Blake find themselves planning a huge celebration in a mansion, neither knew what they'd find. They unexpectedly find a love and adventure they never knew could be true.

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Hosted by Alexander Armstrong. In each episode four teams of two contestants attempt to find correct but obscure answers to four rounds of general knowledge questions, with the winning team eligible to compete for the show's cash jackpot.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Hosted by Ben Shepherd, three players are pit against a mesmerising machine. There are mystery prizes and a jaw-dropping jackpot up for grabs for any player with the skill and strategy to see off their human rivals and conquer the machine.

programme.title: 9News Afternoon
programme.desc: Hosted by Monika Kos, this live one-hour state-wide bulletin brings viewers up-to-date with the news and debates of the day with a mix of live reports and expert chats. Your Perth, Your News.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Tipping Point Australia will push contestants' luck to the very edge. Three contestants will go head to head against the mesmerising machine with one lucky contestant playing for the Jackpot. Hosted by Todd Woodbridge.

programme.title: A Current Affair
programme.desc: A Current Affair covers the realms of politics, crime, human rights, science, technology, celebrities and entertainment - all investigated by a dedicated team.

programme.title: Live: NRL Thursday Night Footy
programme.desc: Wide World of Sports presents Thursday Night footy with Dolphins v Bulldogs, live from Suncorp Stadium. Join our expert commentary team for all the action, analysis and post match interviews. Kick off at 7:50PM AEST.

programme.title: Live: NRL Thursday Night Footy Post-Match
programme.desc: Join the Wide World of Sports team for all the post-match NRL news and analysis.

programme.title: 9News Late
programme.desc: Join the 9News Late team for all of today's top stories from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: The Night Caller
programme.desc: Tony and Lawrence get into a fight and Tony discovers a secret. DS Marshall begins to close in.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Hosted by Ben Shepherd, three players are pit against a mesmerising machine. There are mystery prizes and a jaw-dropping jackpot up for grabs for any player with the skill and strategy to see off their human rivals and conquer the machine.

programme.title: Reel Destinations
programme.desc: Join Dyllon Schulz and the Reel Destinations crew on an epic fishing adventure as they catch and cook their way around Queensland.

programme.title: 9News Morning
programme.desc: Join 9News for up to the minute news on local and international news including sport and weather.

programme.title: To England, With Love
programme.desc: As far as Ali's concerned, she has it all. Until a mysterious quest sends her from Los Angeles to England on a treasure hunt through history and she finds herself opening up to old and new loves all over again.
